results.title: Campaigners urge G7 chiefs to protect children from AI risks
results.description: Ahead of the heads of state and government meeting in Evian, eastern France, 95 young people from 19 countries gathered to call on "world leaders to protect our education, mental health and social well-being" as AI chatbots, companions and agents spread through the technology ecosystem.

results.title: Luhansk region transfers General Cherry drones worth UAH 30M to combat brigade
results.description: More than 840 unmanned aerial vehicles worth almost UAH 30 million were handed over by communities in the Luhansk region to servicemembers of the 125th Separate Brigade.

results.title: ‘We were shocked’: Spartanburg County residents criticize handling of data center discussions
results.description: Spartanburg County leaders have taken the first step toward a possible one-year moratorium on data centers, but some residents say their biggest concern is not the proposed pause itself — it’s how the decision was handled.

results.title: 'If they behave, they get benefits': Vance reveals three pillars of Trump-Iran agreement
results.description: Vance said the agreement is built around three commitments: Iran will not be allowed to develop a nuclear weapon, the Strait of Hormuz will remain open to global shipping, and Tehran could receive significant economic benefits if it complies with the agreement.

results.title: 'Without me, there would be no Israel', Trump explodes
results.description: US President Donald Trump has issued a rare public rebuke of Israel's military tactics in Lebanon targeting Hezbollah militants.

results.title: Drivers rush to rescue survivors trapped in plane that crashed on Texas highway
results.description: A small plane crashed onto a highway in Laredo, Texas, on Tuesday, June 16, 2026.

results.title: Joel Villanueva says joining new Senate majority was 'for work'
results.description: Senator Joel Villanueva said his decision to join the new majority bloc in the Senate was motivated by a desire to focus on legislative work, a move that effectively sealed the leadership change in the chamber.

results.title: ACC begins process to bring back Benazir Ahmed from UAE
results.description: The Anti-Corruption Commission (ACC) on Tuesday initiated the necessary process to bring back former Inspector General of Police (IGP) Benazir Ahmed, who was recently arrested in the United Arab Emirates (UAE), under the existing prisoner transfer framework. ACC Deputy Director Aktarul Islam confirmed the development to journalists. According to ACC officials, the required documents have... Details

results.title: Hungary’s new law prevents Orban comeback
results.description: Hungary's parliament passes constitutional amendment capping a prime minister's rule at eight years, fulfilling Peter Magyar's vow to bar a Viktor Orban comeback.
